summary: Generated Postman Collection v2.1 covering all API routes: health, auth, teams, players, schedules, and reports.
reason: No machine-readable API documentation existed. The Postman collection allows developers and testers to exercise all endpoints without manual configuration. A root-level copy was added because the task request explicitly asked for postman-api.json in the application root.
risk: NONE — this task creates documentation artifacts only. No source code, migrations, or runtime behavior were modified.
tests: Validated both JSON files syntactically and verified the collection structure against the registered routes and request/response contracts.
notes: Import either Postman collection file into Postman, set base_url if needed, and run Login first to populate access_token automatically. The canonical task output remains tools/postman/soccer-team-report.postman_collection.json.
